tool_args.label: Easement Approval Conditions
tool_args.raw_text: MNR approved CMHB's request to expand the use of the Easement Area. The approval is contingent upon several conditions, including obtaining municipal approval for vehicle access (now secured), cleanup of debris, installation of two (2) eight-foot (8') fences along the easement, ongoing maintenance of the gate and fence, and installation of signage indicating the driveway is active.

payload.claim_text: MNR approved CMHB's request to expand the use of the Easement Area. The approval is contingent upon several conditions, including obtaining municipal approval for vehicle access (now secured), cleanup of debris, installation of two (2) eight-foot (8') fences along the easement, ongoing maintenance of the gate and fence, and installation of signage indicating the driveway is active.
